title: hymenoclea salsola var. patula
intro: Hymenoclea salsola var. patula, commonly known as the 'Desert Ironwood', is a variety of tree or shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The Desert Ironwood has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of the Desert Ironwood include relief from digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as its use in treating wounds and reducing fever. The herbal preparations of the Desert Ironwood include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the leaves, roots, or bark of the plant.
